## What this changes

<!-- New review, correction, new category, or docs. One or two sentences. -->

## Type

- [ ] New tool review
- [ ] Correction or update to an existing review
- [ ] New category or structural change
- [ ] Docs or other

## Checklist for tool reviews

- [ ] Used the [tool entry template](../docs/tool-entry-template.md)
- [ ] Front matter complete, and `slug` matches the filename
- [ ] Scored all nine dimensions using the [rating methodology](../docs/rating-methodology.md)
- [ ] Volatile facts (pricing, model names, limits) have at least two sources
- [ ] Added a Last verified date
- [ ] Stated best for, not for, and at least one dealbreaker
- [ ] Picked a recommendation tier and said who it applies to
- [ ] Added the tool to its category `README.md` shortlist
- [ ] Disclosed any conflict of interest in the `disclosure` field

## Disclosure
